title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
